title: Modified Qiagen Plasmid Midi

before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"deprp","text":"Add RNase A solution to Buffer P1, mix, and store at 2–8°C.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"c84bj","text":"Optional: Add LyseBlue® reagent to Buffer P1 at a ratio of 1:1000.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"aceh7","text":"Prechill Buffer P3 at 4°C.
